name: Sugarless Banana Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed bananas, oil, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
2. Stir in the oats, chopped nuts, and raisins until well mixed.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Press each portion lightly with a fork to form cookies.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
- Each cookie contains approximately 111 calories, with 59% of those calories coming from fat.
- To reduce the fat content, you can decrease the amount of nuts used in the recipe.
